flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Texas Southmost College fell 13% between 2021 and 2024 (3.9k → 3.4k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Texas Southmost College rose 43% between 2021 and 2024 (47.4% → 67.8%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Texas Southmost College rose 24% between 2012 and 2015 (24.7% → 30.5%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Texas Southmost College fell 11% between 2017 and 2020 ($10.1k → $9.0k).
